headline: SecureSpace Deer Park Opens on Long Island
summary: SecureSpace Self Storage ("SecureSpace"), a leading self-storage platform with locations across key urban markets in the U.S., has opened its newest location at 999 Long Island Ave in Deer Park, NY. This marks SecureSpace's first store on Long Island, and 11th in the New York City MSA.

headline: LGBTQ consumers cut spending at Target, Walmart, Amazon over DEI
summary: Nearly 72% of LGBTQ+ consumers say they buy fewer products from companies they see as reducing diversity commitments, a new HRC survey found

raw.headline: LGBTQ consumers cut spending at Target, Walmart, Amazon over DEI
raw.summary: Nearly 72% of LGBTQ+ consumers say they buy fewer products from companies they see as reducing diversity commitments, a new HRC survey found

headline: Target, Walmart and Amazon among brands losing LGBTQ+ consumer spending, new survey says
summary: LGBTQ+ consumers are shifting spending toward companies they view as supporting DEI and away from those seen as retreating, HRC survey finds.

raw.headline: Target, Walmart and Amazon among brands losing LGBTQ+ consumer spending, new survey says
raw.summary: LGBTQ+ consumers are shifting spending toward companies they view as supporting DEI and away from those seen as retreating, HRC survey finds.
